name: 5dim_compatibility
title: 5Dim's mod - Compatibility
author: 5Dim
description:
Compatibility module for 5Dim's mod
Integrates items from popular mods into 5Dim's organized tabs
Supported mods:
- Krastorio 2
- Space Exploration
- Bob's mods
- Angel's mods
- Omni mods (except Omnifluid)
- Cargo Ships
- Bob Inserters
- AAI Industry & Containers
- Bio Industries
- Mod Mash
- Warehousing
- Transport Drones
- Deadlock Beltboxes & Loaders
- And more!
